div.h3: Intel® 64 and IA-32 Architectures Optimization Specification
div.p: Scenario: Sequential Array Search with Prefetch Distance $D=8$

g.text: Algorithm State Machine: Pipelined Memory Access

ul.li: Temporal Hint: T0 (Temporal Data - keep in L1)
Performance Gain: Up to 3.5x for memory-bound sequential scans
